pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly use this path for the VeraCrypt volume creation and mounting.
setup_task.sh explicitly sets the password parameter to this value when creating the volume.
setup_task.sh generates the initial random keyfile at this exact path.
export_result.sh checks for the existence of the newly rotated keyfile at this exact path.
setup_task.sh explicitly copies sample data into the mounted volume with this destination filename.

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task operates on a synthetically generated VeraCrypt volume created by setup_task.sh. Verified that the explicit password ('Research2024!'), volume path, old and new key paths, and the sample data file name ('experiment_results.csv') explicitly match the task description instructions and setup/export scripts.
